title: Board Viewer granularity
excerpt: It would be helpful if there was a view level that is not owner, but not restricted viewing. E.g. Group A can view only what they are assigned to, but group B can view everything on the board, and only the board owners c…

posts.author: efarmer (Ethan)
posts.cookedHtml: It would be helpful if there was a view level that is not owner, but not restricted viewing. E.g. Group A can view only what they are assigned to, but group B can view everything on the board, and only the board owners can modify the board columns, for example.
